---
name: azure-pipeline-debug
description: Debug Azure pipeline build failures by inspecting logs, identifying transient vs deterministic failures, and proposing fixes.
tool-trace: trace-azure
---
# Session e2e-1 — initial azure-pipeline-debug

User asked how to debug Azure pipeline failures. We inspected build logs via
`pipelines_get_build_log_by_id`, classified the failure as transient (connection
timeout — retry once) vs deterministic (yaml syntax error — fix directly), and
proposed targeted edits to the failing azure-pipelines.yaml.
